title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Dunzo Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Dunzo Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Dunzo Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About Dunzo Capital India:
Dunzo Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Capital India!
